phrases.text_local: Pode indicar-me como chegar aos bares da Rua da Atalaia?
phrases.pronunciation: PAW-dih een-dee-KAHR-MIH KOH-moo shih-GAHR UHOOSH BAH-rihsh DUH ROOUH DUH uh-tuh-LEYEUH?

likely_response.local: Consulte o porteiro ou um garçom — eles sabem indicar o caminho.
likely_response.pronunciation: koong-SOOW-tih AW poo-ruh-TAY-roo OHW OONNG guh-ruh-SOHNG— EH-lihsh SAH-bayng een-dee-KAHR AW kuh-MEE-nyoo.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the doorman or a waiter — they know how to give directions.

responses.english: Ask the doorman or a waiter — they know how to give directions.
responses.phonetic: koong-SOOW-tih AW poo-ruh-TAY-roo OHW OONNG guh-ruh-SOHNG— EH-lihsh SAH-bayng een-dee-KAHR AW kuh-MEE-nyoo.
responses.french: Consulte o porteiro ou um garçom — eles sabem indicar o caminho.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Miradouro de São Pedro de Alcântara?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DIH SOWN PEHD-roo DIH ahl-KAHNNG-tuh-ruh?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Miradouro de São Pedro de Alcântara.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DIH SOWN PEHD-roo DIH ahl-KAHNNG-tuh-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Miradouro de São Pedro de Alcântara.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Miradouro de São Pedro de Alcântara.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DIH SOWN PEHD-roo DIH ahl-KAHNNG-tuh-ruh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Miradouro de São Pedro de Alcântara.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Rua da Atalaia bars are
phrases.text_local: Onde ficam os bares da Rua da Atalaia?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuhng OOSH BAH-rihsh DUH ROOUH DUH uh-tuh-LEYEUH?
phrases.cultural_note: Rua da Atalaia is a main nightlife street in Bairro Alto, lined with bars that often have cover charges.

likely_response.local: Os bares ficam na Rua da Atalaia.
likely_response.pronunciation: OOSH BAH-rihsh FEE-kuhng NUH ROOUH DUH uh-tuh-LEYEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: The bars are on Rua da Atalaia.

responses.english: The bars are on Rua da Atalaia.
responses.phonetic: OOSH BAH-rihsh FEE-kuhng NUH ROOUH DUH uh-tuh-LEYEUH.
responses.french: Os bares ficam na Rua da Atalaia.

phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DIH SAHNNG-tuh kuh-tuh-REE-nuh?

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Santa Catarina viewpoint is
phrases.text_local: Qual é o percurso até ao miradouro de Santa Catarina?
phrases.pronunciation: KWAHL EH AW peh-ruh-KOO-ruh-soo uh-TEH OW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DIH SAHNNG-tuh kuh-tuh-REE-nuh?
phrases.cultural_note: This viewpoint overlooks the 25 de Abril Bridge and is a favorite sunset spot.
